summary: Verified the self-loop agent configuration end-to-end. All shell scripts have valid syntax, CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md are byte-identical, all required progressive-disclosure memory files are present, and workflow YAML parses correctly. The validation script (validate.sh) passed without errors.
next_step: The configuration is valid. The workflow will handle branch creation (agent/issue-1), PR creation, and labeling the issue as agent-done automatically via the finalize-round.sh orchestration.
tests: bash .agent/scripts/validate.sh: Repository agent configuration is valid
